Party Rentals in Windsor NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals offers party rentals for selected events in Windsor, Nova Scotia — inflatables, water slides, interactive games, lawn games, 360 Video Booth, Kids Foam Party, and bundled packages. Everything you need for an unforgettable birthday, school event, or community celebration. Windsor is known as the birthplace of hockey and hosts community events and family celebrations throughout the year.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Approximately 75 km from Bridgewater. Travel quoted. Travel fee applies after the first 15 km from Bridgewater ($0.72/km). Final travel cost confirmed with your quote.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, $310, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.
  • Crown Axe Challenge - Interactive Game, $180, Dry-use - Inflatable axe throwing for friendly competition.
  • 360 Video Booth - Video Booth, From $249, Dry-use - 360 Video Booth rental for weddings, graduations, birthdays, school events, community events, corporate events, church events, and fundraisers in Nova Scotia.

Best For

  • Birthday parties
  • School events
  • Community events
  • Summer parties

Frequently Asked Questions

What party rental options are available in Windsor?
Nova Kingdom Rentals offers bouncy castles, water slides, interactive games (axe throw, football darts, carnival games), lawn games, 360 Video Booth, Kids Foam Party, and bundled packages for events in Windsor, Nova Scotia.
Do you offer packages?
Yes. Bundled party packages start from $370 and combine inflatables, games, and activities with built-in savings. Visit our packages page to see all options.
How do I book?
Send your event date, address, event type, product or package choice, number of guests, and setup details through the contact form. We'll confirm availability, travel cost, and deposit requirements.
Are bookings confirmed after submitting an online request?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Nova Kingdom Rentals confirms availability, travel cost, setup suitability, and deposit details before any booking is finalized.

Plan your Windsor party with Nova Kingdom Rentals
